title: Compile NeurIPS Paper PDF from Experiment Data + Manuscript Text
summary: Demo notebook that regenerates 8 publication figures from the NeurIPS 2026 paper compilation evaluation. Loads 88 curated experiment examples from 5 dependency datasets (arithmetic CSD, graph coloring CSD, classifier comparison, temperature manipulation, model fitting) and generates: accuracy profiles, CSD indicator panels, classifier comparison bars, temperature effects, theoretical model R² comparison, and cost-performance scatter. Displays full evaluation metrics (PDF compiled, 25 pages, 8/8 figures, 0 missing citations, 919 total data points) and a quality dashboard. All 24 cells execute successfully in under 2 minutes.
